testsuite.name: com.cognizant.testscripts.TCListRoom

testcase.name: TC022_Rent_Boundary_Value

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Invalid rent -1 should show a proper rent validation message, not generic required-fields error. Actual: Please fill all required (*) fields. expected [false] but found [true], Invalid rent 9999999999 should not expose SQL error. Actual: could not execute statement [Data truncation: Out of range value for column 'rent_amount' at row 1] [insert into postings (available_beds,created_at,expires_at,food_rating,food_review,locality_and_landmark,needs_reconfirmation,office_campus,pg_name,posted_by_user_id,reminder_sent,rent_amount,service_rating,service_review,sharing_type,status,tenant_preference,total_beds) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into postings (available_beds,created_at,expires_at,food_rating,food_review,locality_and_landmark,needs_reconfirmation,office_campus,pg_name,posted_by_user_id,reminder_sent,rent_amount,service_rating,service_review,sharing_type,status,tenant_preference,total_beds) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)] expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Invalid rent -1 should show a proper rent validation message, not generic required-fields error. Actual: Please fill all required (*) fields. expected [false] but found [true], Invalid rent 9999999999 should not expose SQL error. Actual: could not execute statement [Data truncation: Out of range value for column 'rent_amount' at row 1] [insert into postings (available_beds,created_at,expires_at,food_rating,food_review,locality_and_landmark,needs_reconfirmation,office_campus,pg_name,posted_by_user_id,reminder_sent,rent_amount,service_rating,service_review,sharing_type,status,tenant_preference,total_beds) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into postings (available_beds,created_at,expires_at,food_rating,food_review,locality_and_landmark,needs_reconfirmation,office_campus,pg_name,posted_by_user_id,reminder_sent,rent_amount,service_rating,service_review,sharing_type,status,tenant_preference,total_beds) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)] expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at testcase.name: TC019_Candidate_Listing_Creation

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "/my-listings". Current url: "http://localhost:4200/create-listing" (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.103, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.155 (07b52360cc1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\2492381\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50971}, goog:processID: 115528, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50971/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.103, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: c292ef1c93ddfb02a84f576ff9d672f1
